title: desmodium album
intro: Desmodium album, also known as Showy Tick-trefoil or White Desmodium, is a perennial legume native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Desmodium album include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Desmodium album can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and respiratory infections.
